name: Birth of Lucerys Velaryon

quote: delivering the rest in chains to young Alyn Velaryon

quote: finally taking her as his wife

quote: Battle turned to riot turned to slaughter

quote: trust to the mercy of the foe

quote: Ser Perkin's gangling squire Trystane mounted the Iron Throne

quote: his wine cup was deadlier than Valyrian steel
